Package org.springframework.ai.mcp.annotation

package org.springframework.ai.mcp.annotation
Annotations for declaring MCP capabilities (tools, prompts, resources, completion, logging, progress, sampling, elicitation) and list-changed handlers.
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    org.springframework.ai.mcp
    Core support for Model Context Protocol (MCP) integration in Spring AI.
    org.springframework.ai.mcp.annotation.adapter
    Adapters that bridge MCP annotation-based providers to the MCP SDK transport layer.
    org.springframework.ai.mcp.annotation.common
    Common utilities for working with MCP annotation metadata.
    org.springframework.ai.mcp.annotation.context
    Request context types, specifications (logging, progress, sampling, elicitation), and default implementations for MCP request handling.
    org.springframework.ai.mcp.annotation.spring
     
    org.springframework.ai.mcp.aot
     
    org.springframework.ai.mcp.customizer
     
  • Class
    Description
    McpArg
    Marks a method parameter as a MCP Argument.
    McpComplete
    Annotates a method used for completion functionality in the MCP framework.
    McpElicitation
    Annotation for methods that handle elicitation requests from MCP servers.
    McpLogging
    Annotation for methods that handle logging message notifications from MCP servers.
    McpMeta
    Special object used to represent the McpSchema.Meta.meta(), McpSchema.Meta.meta() and McpSchema.Meta.meta() values as method argument in all client and server MCP request and notification handlers.
    McpProgress
    Annotation for methods that handle progress notifications from MCP servers.
    McpProgressToken
    Used to annotate method parameter that should hold the progress token value as received from the requester.
    McpPrompt
    Marks a method as a MCP Prompt.
    McpPromptListChanged
    Annotation for methods that handle prompt list change notifications from MCP servers.
    McpResource
    Marks a method as a MCP Resource.
    McpResource.McpAnnotations
     
    McpResourceListChanged
    Annotation for methods that handle resource list change notifications from MCP servers.
    McpSampling
    Annotation for methods that handle sampling requests from MCP servers.
    McpTool
     
    McpTool.McpAnnotations
    Additional properties describing a Tool to clients.
    McpToolListChanged
    Annotation for methods that handle tool list change notifications from MCP servers.
    McpToolParam
